change: you change the epoch-info structure at genesis

impact.why: Only direct caller; wraps the genesis EpochInfo into WBFTExtra (with GasTip) and RLP-encodes it. Structural change to EpochInfo must be reflected in the extra it builds.

Calls CreateInitialEpochInfo for header.Number==0. Non-genesis branch builds EpochInfo a different way; both must produce the same structure, so changing genesis shape forces the runtime builder to match.
Calls CreateInitialExtraData to populate genesis header ExtraData; genesis block bytes change if epoch-info shape changes.
Test/chain-maker genesis builder calls CreateInitialExtraData; produces headers consumed by the engine, encodes a real genesis contract.
Validates header EpochInfo field-by-field (Candidates/Diligence/Validators/BLSPublicKeys) against buildEpochInfo output; any added/changed field needs a matching check or verification breaks.
Producer that writes EpochInfo into the header extra at epoch blocks via WriteEpochInfo; must emit the same structure as genesis.
Consumers that read EpochInfo back out of headers; downstream of any structural/RLP change to EpochInfo.
Builds the ValidatorSet via validator.NewSet(epochInfo.GetValidators(), epochInfo.BLSPublicKeys, ...); validator-set construction depends on EpochInfo fields.
The struct being changed; RLP codec and GetCandidates/GetValidators/FindValidatorByAddress accessors must be updated for any field change.
Serializes EpochInfo to JSON for RPC; new/changed fields need representation here or the API output drifts.

grep_would_miss: grep 'CreateInitialEpochInfo' finds only 2 sites (its wrapper + the genesis branch in buildEpochInfo); it misses the entire consumer side that reads EpochInfo back from headers.
The runtime (non-genesis) producer buildEpochInfo/writeEpoch and the validator verifyEpoch must structurally mirror the genesis shape, but they never name CreateInitialEpochInfo.
EpochInfo's RLP EncodeRLP/DecodeRLP in core/types/istanbul.go is the real serialization contract; grep on the seed name never reaches it.
validator-set construction (GetValidators -> validator.NewSet) consumes EpochInfo fields but is invisible from the seed symbol.
epochForJSON RPC serializer is a semantic dependent reachable only by following the EpochInfo type, not the genesis function name.
notes: Seed CreateInitialEpochInfo (config.go:258-281) excluded. The change is to the EpochInfo structure as produced at genesis, so the true blast radius is the EpochInfo type itself plus every producer (genesis path + runtime writeEpoch/buildEpochInfo) and consumer (verifyEpoch, extract/get EpochInfo, GetValidators, epochForJSON). testutils/genesis.go and engine_test.go are test fixtures, skipped.
